name: drishti-app
//: @kolu/surface-app is NOT a registry dependency — like @kolu/surface and @kolu/surface-nix-host it is hydrated into node_modules/@kolu/surface-app (its raw .ts sources are consumed directly: no build step). It is sourced hermetically from the npins-pinned kolu tree (npins/sources.json → kolu): nix/overlay.nix extracts it as a nix-store path, nix/env.nix exports it as $DRISHTI_KOLU_SURFACE_APP, and the dev shell / install recipe / build derivation copy it into node_modules exactly like the other @kolu/* packages. @kolu/solid-pwa-install (the PWA install-card adapter) is hydrated the same way; src/client/TabStrip.tsx's Pin-app button consumes it (createPwaInstall + installInstructions), gated on the canInstallPwa/isInstalled signals from useSurfaceApp(). The kolu pin tracks master (juspay/kolu#1199 merged) which ships both the package source and those signals.
